CustomField.description:
Based on the Number of Employees, the Vertical, which is based on Industry, and Geo, which is based on Billing Country
CORE: If Number of Employees > 2999(699 for APAC) THEN Enterprise ELSE Commercial
FS: If Number of Employees > 2999(699 for APAC) THEN Enterprise
(all dependent on Vertical and Geo)
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
Based on the Number of Employees, the Vertical, which is based on Industry, and Geo, which is based on Billing Country
CORE: If Number of Employees > 2999(699 for APAC) THEN Enterprise ELSE Commercial
FS: If Number of Employees > 2999(699 for APAC) THEN Enterprise
(all dependent on Vertical and Geo)
CustomField.label: Market Segment
